name: elliotsawyer/bootswatcher-theme
description: Bootstrap 5 Silverstripe theme with support for Bootswatch theme switching. Includes the default Bootstrap stylesheet out of the box. Install elliotsawyer/bootswatcher for full CMS-based theme picking.

suggest.elliotsawyer/bootswatcher: Provides CMS-based Bootswatch theme switching and automatic CSS/JS download via dev/build
